column7: I tried these once and really didnt like them. They are more sour than I remember
It was not as sour as it says big on package, more of sweet. Can feel the sour from the powder but once it’s gone, it’s just seeet

This one tastes like a disinfectant or bleach lol. Not sour, just weird.

I think this was cleverly designed by food chemists to make the granules sink into a firm gummy substrate in which it would dissolve slowly with even intensity. The flavor lingered without being overwhelming for ~15 minutes.
